description: Verso: Fragment from a deed of betrothal (qiddushin). In the hand of Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi. Dating: 1100–38. The marriage will take place on Shabbat Naḥamu. The man may be named Moshe (last line). He will only make her live in a neighborhood of righteous people. Another of the stipulations involves her mother. For the recto, see: PGPID 35182.
description_he: גב: קטע משטר קידושין. בכתב ידו של חלפון בן מנשה הלוי. תאריך: 1100–1138. החתונה תתקיים בשבת נחמו...
